description_long: This is a light blue suede oxford-style shoe with a rounded toe and a low-profile silhouette. The upper is constructed from a soft, matte suede material, featuring subtle perforations and decorative stitching along the sides and toe cap. The shoe is equipped with a standard criss-cross lacing system using matching blue laces threaded through four pairs of eyelets. The sole is thick and made from a light-colored rubber, with a visible layered construction and a slightly rugged tread for grip. The interior appears to be lined with a soft fabric, and the heel counter is reinforced for added support. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A light blue suede oxford shoe with decorative stitching, criss-cross laces, and a thick, light-colored rubber sole. The design is clean and modern, with a matte finish and subtle perforations.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, decorative stitching, and the layered rubber sole.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the rounded toe, lacing system, and toe cap details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the inner profile, stitching, and the open collar.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the reinforced heel counter and the back of the sole.
